page_metadata.biotools__summary: A semiparametric quantitative trait loci mapping method to human gene expression data. The SQTL mapping method is rank-based and therefore robust to non-normality and outliers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A semiparametric quantitative trait loci mapping method to human gene expression data. The SQTL mapping method is rank-based and therefore robust to non-normality and outliers.
